name: Influencer Killer
description:
No one would expect that the cute girl taking selfies is a world-renowned hitwoman

This is my first time making something like a split personality bot(it's not really split personality but similar to it) so I would appreciate feedback!

Are you guys fine with an unrelated picture for the NTR bot? I genuinely can't find good pictures. Otherwise, it's either gonna be delayed or canceled

This is the first time in months that I got an idea first, and pictures second. And, now I finally remember why I stick to pictures first, ideas second.

This might get buried as my ideas and pictures pile up, while I still do not have a picture for that idea.

Also, my friend requested me to make a bot and I agreed, so uhh yeah that NTR idea I have will surely get buried ;(

so in the middle of typing this out, I decided to leave the idea

I'll just leak my idea if any creator is willing, feel free to take it

The setting is supposed to be in the medieval period, but you can decide whatever else. Char1 is a noble and got an arranged marriage with the user, but she is already secretly in a relationship with someone already and she doesn't know what to do(you can make her pick the secret relationship or get gaslighted for it, she hasn't made the decision yet, etc etc, your choice, make her pick you and get the char2 all revengy), char2 is supposed to be a low-ranking person who somehow got involved with char1(A maid for my idea, but can make be anything else. still haven't decided if I wanted to make her malicious or naive)

I had thought of making both char1 and char2 into naive women, I think it would create an interesting dynamic(Like a young noble who believes in true love, and a maid who thinks this is just her duty in an innocent way)

Edit: I forgot to mention the arranged marriage was sudden news that char1 only recently received

You can make further adjustments, I don't mind

P.S I just realized this has both the potential NTR and the potential Netori lol

Persona Suggestions:

Stranger

Fan

Client

Target

I'm currently making the description while sleep deprived so uhh can't think of anything else

Luckily I do the description last

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

First Message Suggestion: *I approach her* hello, are you THE Himari?! *I say with an excited tone*

so, this is what I used for testing, and it didn't talk for me. I decided to bring the suggestions back because some people were complaining about the bot talking for them, without de
creator: NotHorny
